enrichment_method: Final A-tier candidate verification cross-check via BBB / OpenCorporates / TSBPE

businesses.update: VP Cynthia Clarke + President Gary Hacker = CO-OWNER PARTNERSHIP (not solo). DnB lists 'C.G.' as Owner and 'A.C.' as Partner. Whether they would sell jointly or one buys the other out is the central question. 'Clarke Kent' = Cynthia Clarke + Kent? + Hacker partnership.
businesses.successor_check_v2: needs_followup - co-owner Cynthia Clarke is likely the internal partner, not a younger successor. If both are at retirement age, they would sell together (Gideon-acquirable). If younger Cynthia is heir-apparent, demote.
businesses.verdict_updated: A_acquire_self CANDIDATE if both Gary + Cynthia are >65 (both would sell to outside buyer); B_forward if Cynthia is younger heir-apparent. RETAIN as A_acquire_self candidate with confidence MEDIUM pending OV65 verification on both Hacker and Clarke.
businesses.value_add_thesis_specific: Clarke Kent has $10.6M revenue and 15 employees but NO membership plan visible and NO true online booking on the live site (fetched 2026-05-16) — strong modernization gaps at this scale. AI dispatch (ServiceTitan migration), online booking, recurring service-agreement program launch (Plumb-Smart $19-29/mo target), automated review generation, technician hiring funnel = credible 25-40% EBITDA uplift over 18-24 months in premium 78704 South Austin. Sale value uplift via clean recurring revenue book.

businesses.update: David Hicks is 2nd-gen owner (father George Hicks founded 1952). Master Plumber License #M-8529 (very low number = pre-1990 = 35+ yrs MP tenure). Plus additional licenses 1488, 20904, REG12333, REG13208, 15453 = multi-trade scope. 74-yr operation. No 3rd-gen Hicks mentioned in BBB or website.

NEEDS Harris CAD OV65 check on David Hicks personal residence + TSBPE M-8529 detail check.
